metadata.title: ALSANCAK RUNNERS — Run The City
metadata.description: Alsancak Runners is an urban running collective based in Izmir. Running connects people to the city.

footer.tagline: An Izmir-based running community. Running connects people to the city.

home.everyStride: Every stride, every breath, every moment — shared.

manifesto.label: OUR MANIFESTO
lines: Alsancak Runners is an urban running collective based in Izmir.
Running connects people to the city.
Every street is a route. Every run is a story.
We don't just run — we move culture forward.

about.title: ABOUT US
about.subtitle: An urban running collective redefining how Izmir moves.

weRunTheCity.title: WE RUN THE CITY
weRunTheCity.description: Alsancak Runners was born from a simple idea: running is better together. What started as a small group of friends running along Kordon has grown into Izmir's most vibrant urban running collective.

everyStreetIsARoute.title: EVERY STREET IS A ROUTE
everyStreetIsARoute.description: We don't run in circles. We explore. From the cobblestones of Alsancak to the coastline of Kordon, every run is a journey through the city's layers of history, culture, and energy.

openToAll.title: OPEN TO ALL
openToAll.description: There's no pace requirement. No membership fee. No judgment. Whether you're running your first kilometer or your thousandth, you belong here.

cultureInMotion.title: CULTURE IN MOTION
cultureInMotion.description: Running is more than fitness. It's how we connect with the city, with each other, and with ourselves. We collaborate with brands, artists, and local businesses to create experiences that move beyond the run.

naz.name: NAZ KARAGOZOGLU
naz.bio: When she realized that running was the best thing for her during a difficult period in her life, she wanted to share that feeling with others and show that running is not just about performance and competition, bringing the new running culture together with the rhythm of Izmir.

hakan.name: HAKAN OZDIL
hakan.bio: After playing football for many years, he earned a place at Ege University's School of Physical Education and Sports, where he began coaching. With 23 years of experience, especially in group classes, he now leads the new running culture with his guidance.

izem.name: IZEM GOKDEMIR
izem.bio: While studying Physical Education Teaching at Ege University, she continued playing basketball. After an injury, she returned to Izmir to continue her coaching career while also keeping pace for runners as an Alsancak Runners pacer.
